resources.string: Chatforia ifasha abantu guhuza indimi zitandukanye, ibikoresho bitandukanye, n\'imipaka.
Uburyo bwo kwinjira kuri buri wese
Hitamo uko ubutumwa bugaragara, igihe buzimira, n\'uko konti yawe ikomeza kurindwa.

Chatforia ni ubutumwa bwizewe kandi bukoresha indimi nyinshi bufite uburyo bwo gushakisha amakuru kuva ku rundi ruhande kugeza ku rundi, guhindura ubutumwa ako kanya, no guhamagara mu ijwi/videwo. Intego yacu ni iyoroshye: gufasha abantu guhuza - mu mutekano, mu ibanga, no mu ndimi zitandukanye.
Ubutumwa bushyirwa mu buryo buhishe kuri terefone yawe mbere yuko ivaho. Guhindura, gukoporora no guhuza terefone byagenewe kugabanya ibyo seriveri zacu zishobora kubona.
Uburyo bwo gukingira amakuru kuva ku iherezo kugeza ku iherezo n\'uburyo bwo kugenzura ubuzima bwite bwubatswe muri Chatforia kuva mu ntangiriro.
Mbere na mbere ku buzima bwite
Uburyo bwo kwinjira kuri bose: Hindura mu buryo bwikora indimi zirenga 100.
Uburyo bwo kwinjira kuri bose: Guhindura mu buryo bwikora indimi zirenga 100.
Kugenzura: Gusiba ubutumwa no gusoma inyemezabuguzi ni amahitamo.
Igenzura: Gusiba ubutumwa no gusoma inyemezabuguzi ni amahitamo.
Kubanza kwigenga: Guhindura E2E mu buryo bw\'umwimerere.
Ibanga rya mbere: Uburyo bwo gufunga E2E busanzwe.
Amahitamo yo koroshya gukoresha Chatforia utishingikirije ku majwi.
Kwandika inyandiko z\'amajwi mu buryo bwikora
Shyiraho inyandiko ku butumwa bw\'amajwi wakira.

Ecran y\'urumuri ku ihamagara ryinjira\nUrumuri rugufi rw\'urumuri iyo ihamagara rivuze.
Umucyo mugufi w\'urumuri iyo umuntu ahamagaye.
Bitangirira ku bunini busanzwe. Ongera niba ukunda inyandiko nini.
Erekana amagambo ahinnye mu gihe nyacyo aturuka mu majwi y\'undi muntu witabiriye.
Amatangazo agaragara ku butumwa n\'amahamagara\nErekana amabendera n\'umutwe uhuha kugira ngo udacikwa n\'ibikorwa.
Uburyo bwo kubona no gutanga amakuru
Kurangurura ku butumwa bushya (iyo bushyigikiwe)\nItera kuzenguruka kw\'ibikoresho ukoresheje amatangazo.
Tera imbaraga zo guhindagura igikoresho ukoresheje amatangazo.
Erekana amabendera n\'umutwe uhumbe kugira ngo udacikwa n\'ibikorwa.
Ntushobora kwiyongereraho nk\'umuntu wo kuvugana nawe.
Andika nimero ya terefone cyangwa izina ry\'ukoresha.
Yananiwe kongeramo umuntu wo kuvugana nawe.
Dutanga kandi bimwe mu bikoresho tubinyujije kuri Google AdSense. Inkunga zitaziguye zirahari—koresha fomu iri hepfo.

Dutanga kandi ibicuruzwa binyuze kuri Google AdSense. Ushobora kwibanda kuri Chatforia ukoresheje indangamuntu y\'umwanditsi {{pubId}}, cyangwa ugakoresha fomu iri hepfo kugira ngo ubone inkunga itaziguye.

Gerera abakoresha ubutumwa bw’ingirakamaro mu gutanga ahantu heza kandi hizewe. Dutanga ububiko bw’amabaruwa ahantu hagaragara cyane, abaterankunga, n’amatangazo yo kwamamaza mu nzu. Abafatabuguzi ba mbere ntibabona amatangazo.
Ingengo y\'imari ya buri kwezi (ni ngombwa)
Gufungura umukiriya wawe wa imeri kugira ngo wohereze ikibazo…
Intego, amatariki, KPI, ibyo abantu bakunda gushyira mu mwanya…
Urakoze! Ikibazo cyawe kiri mu nzira. Tuzagukurikirana vuba.
Iyo wohereje, uba wemera amabwiriza yacu
Turimo kurangiza urutonde rw\'amatangazo yacu. Tubwire ibijyanye n\'ubukangurambaga bwawe maze tuzakugira inama yo gushyiramo.
Imiterere idakoresha ikirango; imiterere y\'inshuro nyinshi ikoreshwa mu buryo bwubahiriza
Amasezerano cyangwa porogaramu binyuze kuri AdSense/Google Ads
Inshuro nyinshi zo kuganira n\'igihe cyo kuba muri chat UI
Ibihe byatewe inkunga (urugero, modal ya \"Tangira ikiganiro\") irahari
Hindura ubutumwa bwinjira mu buryo bwikora
Genzura ubusemuzi, ibisubizo by\'ubwenge, n\'ibisubizo byikora bya ForiaBot.
Koresha uburyo bwo gusubiza byikora iyo mfite akazi kenshi
Niba ifunguye, ibitekerezo byatanzwe na AI bizaba bipfutse amagambo
Ohereza ubutumwa bwa nyuma bwakiriwe (bwasukuye) kuri AI kugira ngo utange ibisubizo byihuse.
Ku buntu harimo insanganyamatsiko z\'ibanze. Vugurura kugira ngo ufungure izindi nsanganyamatsiko.
Ongeraho umuntu wakira amakuru haruguru kugira ngo utangire…
Guhindura ubutumwa mu ndimi zirenga 100, gusibangana kw\'ubutumwa, no guhamagara mu ijwi/videwo.
Kuri mudasobwa? Skena ukoresheje telefoni yawe kugira ngo ubone porogaramu.
Andika izina ry\'umuntu wanditse cyangwa nimero ya terefone.
Nyamuneka reba amakuru yawe hanyuma wongere ugerageze.
Nyamuneka wemera ubutumwa bugufi kugira ngo ukomeze.
Kugerageza kenshi cyane. Nyamuneka tegereza wongere ugerageze.
Iryo zina ry\'ukoresha cyangwa imeri byamaze gufatwa.
Uburyo bwo gufunga kuva ku mpera kugeza ku mpera, buri gihe buri gukora
Mbere na mbere. Amakuru yawe, ni wowe ugenzura.
Kuraho inzitizi z\'ururimi mu biganiro byawe
Uburyo bwo gusiba kuva ku mpera kugeza ku mpera busanzwe
Mbere na mbere. Amakuru yawe, ni wowe ugenzura.
Guhindura ubutumwa mu buryo bw\'ubwenge kandi bwubatswemo
Guhindura ubutumwa mu buryo bw\'ubwenge kandi bwubatswemo
Ubutumwa bwizewe ku muntu uwo ari we wese, aho ari ho hose
Guhamagara no kohereza ubutumwa bugufi ni ubuntu. Ubuhanga bwo gukora imibonano mpuzabitsina buhanitse n\'ibikoresho byo mu rwego rwo hejuru bisaba kuvugururwa.
Ubutumwa bwizewe ku muntu uwo ari we wese, aho ari ho hose — hamwe

Shaka nimero ya terefone itekanye ku buntu yo guhamagara no kohereza ubutumwa bugufi ku isi yose ukoresheje Wi-Fi cyangwa amakuru. Ishimire uburyo bwo gushakisha amakuru kuva ku mpera kugeza ku mpera, ubutumwa buzimira, no guhamagara ijwi/videwo bya HD — hamwe n\'ibikoresho byubatswemo bigufasha gukomeza guhuza amakuru n\'abandi.
Iki gikoresho gifite urufunguzo rutandukanye rwo gufunga. Garura urufunguzo rukwiye kugira ngo ugere ku butumwa bwawe.
Iki gikoresho kibuze urufunguzo rwawe rwo gukingira. Gisubize kugira ngo gisome ubutumwa buhishe.
Iki gikoresho kibuze urufunguzo rwawe rwo gukingira. Gisubize kugira ngo gisome ubutumwa bwa kera bwo gukingira.
Shyiramo umuntu umwe wo kwakira ubutumwa ubu ngubu.
Nibura inyuguti 6. Koresha ijambo ry\'ibanga rikomeye kandi ridasanzwe.
Ikoreshwa mu kugenzura, mu mutekano, no mu gukoresha SMS aho ishyigikiwe.

Mu gufungura konti, uba wemera kwakira amatangazo ya SMS ajyanye n\'ibikorwa byawe bya Chatforia (nk\'ubutumwa buturutse ku bandi bakoresha). Ibiciro by\'ubutumwa n\'amakuru bishobora gukurikizwa. Ushobora kwiyambura igihe icyo ari cyo cyose mu Igenamiterere.
Ntabwo nashoboye kongera kohereza imeri yo kugenzura.
Kuri mudasobwa? Skena ukoresheje telefoni yawe kugira ngo ubone porogaramu.
Skena kugira ngo ukure porogaramu cyangwa uyifungure muri porogaramu yawe.
Konti yawe yarashyizweho, ariko gushyiraho urufunguzo rw\'umutekano byarananiranye kuri iki gikoresho. Ongera ugerageze.
Kohereza byarananiranye. Reba konsole kugira ngo umenye ibisobanuro birambuye.
Igihe cyawe cyarangiye. Nyamuneka ongera winjire.
Iyandikishe kugira ngo utangire kohereza ubutumwa kuri Chatforia
Nyamuneka wemere ubutumwa bugufi cyangwa ukureho nimero ya terefone.
Ndemeye kwakira ubutumwa bugufi bwa SMS buturutse kuri Chatforia.
Ubutumwa bwite, buhishe kandi buhinduwe — ako kanya.
Mu gufungura konti, uba wemera Amategeko n\'amabwiriza yacu ya serivisi na Politiki y\'ibanga.
Inama: Koresha konti imwe kuri interineti na telefoni. Ubutumwa bwawe buguma buhujwe.
Imeri yo kugenzura yoherejwe. Reba agasanduku kawe.
Konti yashyizweho. Nyamuneka reba imeri yawe kugira ngo urebe konti yawe igenzurwa mbere yo kwinjira.
Nyamuneka genzura imeri yawe mbere yo kwinjira.
Ese wizeye ko ushaka guhagarika gahunda yawe ako kanya? Ibi ntibishobora guhindurwa.
Ntibishoboka guhagarika gahunda yawe ubu ngubu. Nyamuneka ongera ugerageze cyangwa ukoreshe Manage billing.
Jya ukoresha Plus udafite amatangazo, cyangwa ufungure ibikoresho bya AI hanyuma uhindure isura yawe ukoresheje Premium.
Uburyo bw\'ibanze bwo kugera kuri Chatforia bufite imikorere y\'ingenzi yo kohereza ubutumwa.
Uburyo bwo kohereza amakuru nta matangazo bufite amateka maremare n\'uburyo bwo kohereza amakuru.
Ubushobozi bwuzuye bwo gukoresha uburyo bwo guhindura ibintu ku buryo bw\'igiciro cyinshi, ibikoresho bya AI, n\'ubufasha bw\'ibanze.
Uburyo bw\'ibanze bwo kugera kuri Chatforia bufite imikorere y\'ingenzi yo kohereza ubutumwa.
Uburyo bwo kohereza amakuru nta matangazo bufite amateka maremare n\'uburyo bwo kohereza amakuru.
Ubushobozi bwuzuye bwo gukoresha uburyo bwo guhindura ibintu ku buryo bw\'igiciro cyinshi, ibikoresho bya AI, n\'ubufasha bw\'ibanze.
Uri kuri gahunda y\'ubuntu. Vugurura kugira ngo ufungure ibindi bintu.
Ntabwo nabasha gufungura urubuga rwo kwishyuriraho ubu ngubu.

Gukomeza kwirinda kuri interineti ntibisaba ubumenyi buhanitse mu bya tekiniki—gusa kumenya ibintu, kwitonda no gutekereza neza. Ukoresheje ingeso nziza, ushobora kuvugana n\'abantu mu mutekano kandi mufite icyizere.

Itumanaho ryo kuri interineti ryorohereje cyane kurusha mbere hose kuvugana n\'abantu hirya no hino ku isi. Waba urimo utumanaho n\'inshuti zawe, uhura n\'abantu bashya, cyangwa ukorana mu buryo bw\'umwuga, imbuga zo kohererezanya ubutumwa zigira uruhare runini mu buzima bwa buri munsi. Ariko, kugumana umutekano kuri interineti ni ingenzi kimwe no kugumana amakuru.

Rimwe mu mategeko y\'ingenzi agenga umutekano kuri interineti ni ukwirinda gusangiza abandi amakuru y\'ibanga. Ibi birimo aderesi yawe yo mu rugo, amakuru y\'imari, ijambo ry\'ibanga, cyangwa andi makuru yose akuranga ashobora gukoreshwa nabi. Ndetse no mu biganiro bisanzwe, ni byiza kuzirikana ibyo usangiza n\'abo usangiza.

Guhanahana amakuru mu buryo burangwa n\'icyubahiro bifasha mu gushyiraho ibidukikije birangwa n\'umutekano kuri buri wese. Irinde kugira uruhare mu biganiro bibi cyangwa ibitutsi, kandi zirikana uburyo amagambo yawe ashobora kugira ingaruka ku bandi. Imibanire myiza igira uruhare mu gutuma abakoresha bose babona ibintu neza.

Uburyo bwo kohererezanya ubutumwa bugezweho nka Chatforia butanga ibikoresho bifasha abakoresha kuguma mu mutekano. Ibintu nko gukumira, gutanga raporo, no kugenzura ubuzima bwite byagenewe guha abakoresha ububasha ku byo bakora. Niba hari umuntu witwara nabi cyangwa akagutera kumererwa nabi, ugomba guhita ukoresha ibi bikoresho.

Abatekamutwe bakunze gukoresha uburyo bwo kohereza ubutumwa kugira ngo bashuke abakoresha baboherereze amakuru yabo bwite cyangwa bohereze amafaranga. Witondere ubutumwa busa n\'aho ari bwiza cyane ku buryo budashobora kuba ukuri, nk\'ibitangwa bitunguranye, ubusabe bwihutirwa, cyangwa imirongo utazi. Buri gihe banza ugenzure uwo muvugana mbere yo kugira icyo ukora.
Uburyo bwo kuganira mu mutekano kuri interineti

Uko itumanaho rikoresha ikoranabuhanga rikomeza kwiyongera, ni ko kubungabunga umutekano n\'icyizere birushaho kuba ingenzi. Mu gukurikiza amahame y\'ibanze y\'umutekano no gukoresha ibikoresho biboneka, abakoresha bashobora kwishimira inyungu zo kohereza ubutumwa mu gihe bigabanya ibyago.
Impamvu umutekano wo kuri interineti ari ingenzi

Imwe mu mpinduka zikomeye mu itumanaho ni ukugabanya inzitizi z’uturere. Abantu ubu bashobora kuvugana n’abandi hirya no hino ku isi mu gihe gito. Byaba ari mu biganiro bwite, mu bucuruzi, cyangwa mu bufatanye, imbuga zo kohererezanya ubutumwa zatumye intera igabanuka cyane.

Ahazaza h\'itumanaho ku isi hashobora kuba harimo ibikoresho bigezweho, nko kohereza ubutumwa hifashishijwe ubuhanga bwa \"AI\", guhindura mu buryo bunoze, no kunoza ubunararibonye bw\'abakoresha. Uko ikoranabuhanga rigenda ritera imbere, itumanaho rizakomeza kugenda ryoroha kandi rigera ku bantu benshi.

Itumanaho ryateye imbere cyane mu myaka mike ishize. Ibyari bisanzwe bisaba guhamagara kuri telefoni cyangwa inama imbonankubone ubu bishobora gukorwa vuba binyuze mu buryo bwo kohererezanya ubutumwa. Uko ikoranabuhanga rikomeza gutera imbere, itumanaho mpuzamahanga ririmo kwihuta, kuboneka ku bantu benshi, no kumenyekanisha amakuru yose.
Amasano nka Chatforia ni kimwe mu bigize iri hinduka, bifasha abantu guhuza byoroshye n\'indimi zitandukanye n\'imipaka.

Uko itumanaho rigenda rirushaho kuba ikoranabuhanga, ubuzima bwite n\'umutekano birarushaho kuba ingenzi. Abakoresha bashaka icyizere cy\'uko ibiganiro byabo birinzwe. Ibintu nk\'uburyo bwo gushakisha amakuru n\'igenamiterere rigenzurwa n\'abakoresha bifasha mu gutumanaho mu buryo butekanye.

Umuvuduko ni ikintu cy\'ingenzi kigira uruhare mu gutumanaho kwa none. Abakoresha biteze ko ubutumwa butangwa vuba, kandi ibikorwa remezo bigezweho bishyigikira icyo cyifuzo. Ubutumwa bwihuse butuma habaho ibiganiro bifatika kandi birambuye.
Uburyo bwo guhuza mu gihe nyacyo

Ubusanzwe ururimi rwabaye imwe mu mbogamizi zikomeye ku itumanaho mpuzamahanga. Muri iki gihe, ibikoresho by’ubuhinduzi byubatswemo bifasha kuziba icyo cyuho. Imbuga nka Chatforia zemerera abakoresha kuvugana byoroshye nubwo bavuga indimi zitandukanye, bigatuma habaho amahirwe mashya yo guhuza no kumvikana.
Suzuma ubumenyi ku itumanaho, umutekano kuri interineti, n\'uburyo ikoranabuhanga ryo kohereza ubutumwa rihuza abantu hirya no hino ku isi.
Uburyo bwo kuganira mu mutekano kuri interineti
Impamvu urubuga rwo kohereza ubutumwa ari ingenzi

Abantu bishingikiriza kuri porogaramu zo kohererezanya ubutumwa buri munsi kugira ngo baganire n\'inshuti, umuryango, n\'abo bakorana. Byaba ari amakuru mashya cyangwa ikiganiro kirekire, kohereza ubutumwa bitanga uburyo bworoshye kandi bworoshye bwo gukomeza kuvugana.

Ubutumwa bukomeje gutera imbere hamwe n\'ibintu bishya nko gusubiza hakoreshejwe ubuhanga bwa \"AI\", guhindura no gusangira amakuru mu buryo butandukanye. Uko ikoranabuhanga rigenda ritera imbere, urubuga rwo kohereza ubutumwa ruzarushaho kuba rukomeye kandi rushobora gukoreshwa mu buryo butandukanye.

Uburyo bwo kohererezanya ubutumwa buhuza abantu hirya no hino ku isi. Hamwe no gukoresha interineti, abakoresha bashobora kuvugana aho bari hose, bigatuma byoroha kubaka umubano no gukorana mu mahanga.

Uburyo bwo kohereza ubutumwa bwabaye bumwe mu buryo bw\'ingenzi mu itumanaho muri iki gihe. Kuva ku biganiro bwite kugeza ku mikoranire y\'ubucuruzi, porogaramu zo kohereza ubutumwa zemerera abantu gukomeza guhuza amakuru ako kanya kandi neza.
Chatforia yubatswe hifashishijwe aya mahame mu mutwe, itanga uburyo bwo kohereza ubutumwa bwihuse, bwizewe kandi bworoshye gukoreshwa ku isi ifitanye isano.

Uburyo bwo kohereza ubutumwa bugezweho bwibanda ku guha abakoresha ububasha bwo kugenzura amakuru yabo n\'ibiganiro byabo. Ibintu nk\'uburyo bwo gukingira amakuru, igenamiterere ry\'ubuzima bwite, n\'uburyo bwo kugenzura ubutumwa bituma abakoresha bavugana mu bwisanzure.

Kimwe mu byiza by\'ingenzi bya porogaramu zo kohereza ubutumwa ni umuvuduko wazo. Ubutumwa butangwa ako kanya, bigatuma abakoresha babasha kuvugana mu gihe nyacyo. Uru rwego rwo koroshya ubutumwa rwatumye ubutumwa buba uburyo bwiza bwo gutumanaho ku bantu benshi.
Impamvu urubuga rwo kohereza ubutumwa rufite akamaro kurusha mbere hose
Guhamagara kwawe vuba aha bizagaragara hano.
Guhamagara kwawe vuba aha no gusohoka.
Nta ndangamuntu yo guhamagara inyuma ihari.
Nta kintu na kimwe kijyanye n\'ihamagara ritegereje.
Guhamagara mu cyumba bishyigikira videwo gusa ubu.
Guhamagara kuri videwo bihari gusa ku bakoresha porogaramu ubu.
Uburyo bwo gusaba: Koresha buto iri hepfo kugirango wohereze CV yawe na links kuri imeri.

Turi itsinda rito ry’abashinze Chatforia — itsinda ryigenga, ritanga ubutumwa ku isi yose kuri interineti, iOS, na Android. Niba ushishikajwe n’ubuzima bwite, uburyo bwo kubika amakuru, n’uburambe bwiza bw’abakoresha, twishimiye kumva ibyo uvuga.

Imirimo y\'abashinze: Injeniyeri Mukuru w\'Inyongera, Injeniyeri w\'Inyongera (Node.js), Injeniyeri w\'Inyongera/Imbuga (React), Injeniyeri w\'Inyongera (iOS), Injeniyeri w\'Inyongera (Android), DevOps/SRE, Injeniyeri w\'Umutekano n\'Uburinzi, Injeniyeri w\'Ikoranabuhanga (Twilio + eSIM).

• Fasha kubaka ishingiro ry'ubutumwa bushya ku isi.
• Kohereza ubutumwa bukoreshwa kuri interineti, iOS, na Android.
• Korana n'uwashinze porogaramu ku buryo butaziguye ku bwubatsi n'icyerekezo cy'ibicuruzwa.
• Ufite ahantu hagira ingaruka zikomeye muri iyi porogaramu: ubutumwa, ijwi, videwo, uburyo bwo gushakisha amakuru, itumanaho, ubuhanga bwo gukora imibonano mpuzabitsina.
• Jyana mu ntangiriro — mbere y'uko umubare w'abakoresha ugera ku gipimo cy'umubare w'abakoresha.

Chatforia ikoresha cookies nkeya (urugero, session, security). Ntidukoresha cookies z\'amatangazo y\'abandi. Genzura cookies ukoresheje igenamiterere rya mushakisha yawe.

Chatforia ntigurisha amakuru bwite. Abaturage ba California baracyashobora kohereza ubusabe munsi ya CPRA bakoresheje akabuto kari hepfo.
Ntugurishe cyangwa ngo usangize amakuru yanjye bwite

Iyo utanze nimero ya telefoni igendanwa, wemera ko Chatforia ishobora kukoherereza ubutumwa bugufi bujyanye na konti yawe n\'ikoreshwa rya serivisi, nk\'amatangazo yo kwinjira, amatangazo y\'umutekano, n\'ubutumwa bujyanye n\'ibiganiro utangije cyangwa witabira. Ugumana uburenganzira ku bikubiye mu nyandiko yawe. Uduha uburenganzira bukenewe bwo gukoresha serivisi (urugero: gukwirakwiza amakuru, kuyabika, kuyahindura).
Plus ikuraho amatangazo no kohereza ubutumwa. Premium ifungura izindi nsanganyamatsiko, amajwi y\'ubutumwa, amajwi y\'ijwi, ibikoresho bya AI, hamwe n\'uburambe bwose bwa Chatforia.
